# Rithvik Shetty

> Full stack developer and freelancer specializing in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. Based in India. 4+ years building production web apps, ML projects, and freelance client work.

This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org/) to help AI agents and LLMs find and cite content on this site accurately.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://rithvikshetty.in/): Overview, featured projects, intro.
- [About](https://rithvikshetty.in/about): Bio, skills, resume link.
- [Projects](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects): Full project portfolio (client work and personal projects).
- [Work Experience](https://rithvikshetty.in/experience): Internships, leadership roles, employment history.
- [Awards](https://rithvikshetty.in/awards): Hackathon wins, awards, recognitions.
- [Contact](https://rithvikshetty.in/contact): Ways to reach Rithvik.
- [Chat](https://rithvikshetty.in/chat): AI chatbot trained on Rithvik's background, answers questions about him.

## Projects

- [InterviewDump](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/interviewdump): Free full-stack tech interview prep platform, 500+ questions across DSA/SQL/System Design/Core CS/Aptitude.
- [AnyFormat](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/anyformat): File conversion platform, 18+ tools for PDF/image/document processing, Redis URL shortener, Razorpay payments.
- [TRCT.in](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/trct-in): Website for Thane Run Club Tribe, event registration and leaderboards.
- [AutoPharmaX](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/autopharmax): AI platform analyzing drug efficacy data using BERT/transformer models.
- [SeaGuard](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/seaguard): React Native app for water quality monitoring and fisherman safety alerts, presented to ISRO.
- [Groww.in](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/groww-in): Frontend recreation of the Groww investment platform.
- [LoopList](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/looplist): Real-time collaborative to-do list app using Firebase.
- [Object Measurement](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/object-measurement): Python/OpenCV tool measuring physical object dimensions from images.
- [Spotify UI](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/spotify-ui): Frontend study recreating the Spotify web interface.
- [DevTune CLI](https://rithvikshetty.in/projects/devtune): Terminal-based Spotify controller and IDE extension.

## Contact / social

- GitHub: https://github.com/rithvikshettyy
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rithvikshetty/
- Pinterest: https://in.pinterest.com/mayberithvik/

## Notes for agents

- All pages are publicly indexable; see /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml.
- For structured facts (name, job title, skills, projects), prefer the JSON-LD (schema.org Person/ItemList/CreativeWork) embedded in each page over scraping rendered text.
